series_metadata.series_description: Weekly reports compiled by the Governor’s staff which summarize the constituent contact for that week. The reports include the number of constituent letters, faxes, email, and phone calls received for that week; the number of resolutions and petitions received; and a list by subject area on the constituent contact for that week. The weekly reports also include samples of the constituent correspondence received.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until end of the administration, then transfer to the State Archives. ; Electronic: Print out paper copy, then retain electronic copy in office until end of administration, then delete., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Delete
